summary: Iteration 2 e2e validation of upgrades (realistic 3D anatomy, SSE tutor stream + persistent history, Quiz Arena with XP/streaks/badges/leaderboard, AR/VR Lab, audio narration). Backend 22/22 pytest passing (9 new + 13 from iteration 1 regression). Frontend mostly working — one CRITICAL runtime bug found: HeartExplorer.jsx uses <NarratorButton> without importing it, so the narrator button never renders on the Heart side panel (BrainExplorer is fine).

minor.issue: MongoDB update spec uses `'$push': {'badges': {'$each': new_badges}} if new_badges else {}` which would emit an empty `$push: {}` operator on no-new-badge submissions. MongoDB tolerates this (no error observed), but it's fragile — recommend wrapping the push into the dict conditionally instead.

`last_active` is stored as ISO string; the streak comparison via `datetime.fromisoformat(last).date()` works but is locale-naive. Multi-timezone users could see streaks reset on UTC day boundary. Not blocking — flag for future.

ui_bugs.issue: Runtime error 'NarratorButton is not defined' — HeartExplorer.jsx line 214 uses <NarratorButton text=... /> but the file never imports it. As a result the Narration card crashes and the Listen button never appears in the heart hotspot panel. BrainExplorer.jsx correctly imports it (line 10).

Spec says brain should render as 'two hemispheres' via AnatomicalBrain. The mesh visible on landing renders as a single spiky displacement blob (gyri displacement applied to one sphere). No left/right hemisphere split visible. Heart looks correct (chambers + aorta + vena cava). Visual-quality nit, not a crash.

issues: After completing a quiz with all wrong picks, results screen shows '0/5 correct, +0 XP earned' with no encouragement copy and Retry+More buttons only — fine but bland. Toast '+0 XP earned' technically correct but odd UX (showing a +0 reward).
Brain mesh visual quality below 'realistic 3D' bar set by the spec — currently looks like a low-poly thorny ball rather than gyri-folded hemispheres.

action_items: FIX (1-line): add `import NarratorButton from '../components/NarratorButton';` at the top of /app/frontend/src/pages/HeartExplorer.jsx (BrainExplorer already has it at line 10).
(Visual polish) Revisit AnatomicalBrain in /app/frontend/src/components/Anatomy3D.jsx to render two distinct hemispheres separated by a longitudinal fissure, not a single displaced sphere.
(Minor) Clean up the conditional `$push` in submit_quiz to avoid emitting `$push: {}` when there are no new badges.
(Polish) Add encouragement copy on quiz results screen when score == 0.
critical_code_review_comments: HeartExplorer.jsx is missing the NarratorButton import — production runtime error. This should have been caught by an ESLint no-undef rule.

tutor_stream correctly persists both user and assistant messages and emits the spec-conformant `data: {...}` SSE chunks with a final `{done:true, session_id, persona}` event. Verified via raw SSE iteration.
Quiz gamification: XP math (10/correct + 50 perfect bonus) verified — earned_xp == 100 for 5/5. Streak idempotency on same UTC day verified. Leaderboard ordered desc by xp and _id excluded.
Badge awarding is idempotent against existing badges (current + new dedupe in _award_badges). Good.

Frontend AskAI correctly uses fetch + ReadableStream (not EventSource) and includes credentials — observed POST /api/tutor/stream returning 200 with progressive UI fill and persisted history across reloads.

ARVRLab page renders without runtime errors, canvas mounts, all required testids (enter-ar, enter-vr, xr-target-heart, xr-target-brain) present and clickable. WebXR session itself not exercisable headlessly — acceptable per spec.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2.py (new — 9 tests for badges, tutor stream/history, quiz submit, leaderboard)

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (Quiz, AskAI streaming+persistence, AR/VR, Brain narrator, Landing all working; Heart narrator broken due to missing import; brain hero mesh visual below spec)

test_credentials: Bearer test_session_anatomia_001 (also accepted as cookie session_token). User: test-user-anatomia / Dr. Test / medical_student. After this run XP=360, streak=1, badges include first-quiz/perfect-quiz/xp-100 — main agent may want to re-seed if next iteration expects pristine 100 XP.
seed_data_creation: None new. The pre-existing test user XP was incremented by quiz submit tests (100 + 30 = +130 XP).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/{test_api.py, test_iteration2.py} — run `pytest backend/tests/ -v`. SSE stream test reads `r.iter_lines()` after `stream=True` and expects lines beginning with `data: `. AskAI on the frontend uses fetch+ReadableStream and was verified to call POST /api/tutor/stream returning 200 with full medical-student response. Heart Explorer narrator is broken until NarratorButton is imported. Test user XP/streak/badges have drifted from seed; rerun the seed script in /app/auth_testing.md if a clean baseline is required.
rca_of_the_issue: Heart narrator failure RCA: /app/frontend/src/pages/HeartExplorer.jsx line 214 renders <NarratorButton text={narration} label='Listen' />, but the file lacks the corresponding `import NarratorButton from '../components/NarratorButton'` statement (BrainExplorer.jsx has it on line 10). At runtime React throws 'NarratorButton is not defined' (captured as a pageerror in Playwright), the Narration card subtree fails to render, and consequently no element with data-testid='narrator-btn' exists in the heart side panel. Fix is a one-line import addition. Reproduction: visit /app/heart, click any hotspot, check `document.querySelector('[data-testid="narrator-btn"]')` → null.
